view.title: Validate explicit UC need #7
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the visibility of the date of last inspection.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 7 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the visibility of the date of last inspection.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the visibility of the date of last inspection.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the date of the last inspection is visible on the equipment tag/QR code. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or checks related to the visibility of the date of last inspection on the QR code or equipment tag. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status as the requirement cannot be confirmed or denied based on the available data.
